_instructions: Log your gut score for anything you've seen. The AI will write the review TO your score, not make up its own. Format: 'Title (Year)': { score, notes }

Longlegs (2024).notes: Style over substance. Cage is fascinating but the mystery doesn't hold together.

Alien: Romulus (2024).notes: Safe and competent but creatively empty. Gorgeous to look at. Nothing new to say.
